title: Lezer90's pvp resourcepack
description: one of the best pvp resource pack ever made that is blue themed and improves almost everything and works for every gamemode (mace, crystal, sword, axe, uhc, etc....)
body:
**Lezer90's PvP Resource Pack**


(Note: If you want the blue/red version you need to select it from versions)


A clean, competitive, blue-themed resource pack designed for PvP and better visibility.

---

### Features

* Blue Netherite armor & tools
* Short tools and weapons (better visibility)
* Blue enchant glint
* Blue crit & sweep attack effects
* Blue crystals, maces, respawn anchors & end crystals
* Blue elytra
* Animated blue XP bar
* Outlined ores
* Ancient City panorama
* Better crosshair
* Differentiated **Breach** and **Density** maces
* Black & blue bow / crossbow design
* Bow & crossbow status indicator (ready / not ready to shoot)

---

### PvP Enhancements ⚔️

* No pumpkin blur
* No fishing bobber
* Side shield + small shield
* Visible shield durability
* Visible shield cooldown
* Better spear design
* Transparent GUI (version 5.10 only)

---

### Visual Improvements ✨

* Animated ender pearls, eye of ender, wind charge & fire charge
* Small animated totems
* Better potions
* Apples retextured
* Better particles

---

### Performance & Clarity 🔥

* Small fire
* No burning particles
* No explosion particles

---

### works well with:
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/qraftys-capitalized-font
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dark-gui-exp

---

### Credits & License 📜

* Some textures are based on work by other creators (used with permission or under open licenses).
* Licensed under **Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International
 (CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0)**
* Please give proper credit if you use or modify this pack.
* Texture used from other projects are mentioned in `credits.text`
* some textures were inspired by https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pvp-smp-deluxe

---
You can now download the orange version!
Purple at 2000 downloads
